name: AWS S3 Storage
description: AWS S3 storage backend, contributed into storage:provider — sandboxed. PutObject/DeleteObject signed with SigV4 via host crypto; the secret access key stays host-side. Uploads stream as base64 (bounded by the isolate memory limit).

settings.label: Endpoint URL
settings.help: Path-style base URL, e.g. https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com (used for egress + the allowlist).

secrets.label: Secret Access Key
secrets.help: AWS secret access key; used host-side in the SigV4 chain, never seen by the plugin.
